title: Course Schedule
input_format: An integer `numCourses` and an array of prerequisites `prerequisites[i] = [ai, bi]` indicating you must take course `bi` first before taking course `ai`.
output_format: `true` if you can finish all courses, `false` otherwise.
constraints:
- `1 <= numCourses <= 2000`
- `0 <= prerequisites.length <= 5000`
- `prerequisites[i].length == 2`
- `0 <= ai, bi < numCourses`
- All the pairs `prerequisites[i]` are **unique**.
function_signature: function canFinish(numCourses: number, prerequisites: number[][]): boolean {}
